ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stacey Stecher, Esq. for Petitioners.

Order to Show Cause as to Attorney Stacey Stecher is hereby off calendar and discharged. No sanctions issued.

Petitioner is waiting for inventory from referee to finalize and file its petition.
Court orders matter continued to May-26-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: S. Monroe. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Feb-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The matter was called for hearing on status of closing of the estate.

The Court continued the matter to February 17, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court stated an Order to Appear shall be issued to attorney Michael J. Stecher to appear at the continued hearing, as well as an Order to Show Cause re sanctions in the amount of $250 for failure to appear.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacy Stecher for Roy Flores and Anastacio Flores, Jr., Petitioners.

Discussions were held regarding the presumption under Probate Code Section 6124. The court determined that the presumption of revocation does not apply here, based on the finding that the original will was last in the possession of Anarose Schelstrate, who either lost or misplaced it after receiving it from the decedent.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated January 12, 2022 is admitted to probate. Roy Flores and Anastacio Flores Jr. are appointed Administrators with Will Annexed of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Continued To Dec-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
